title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google released DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a novel approach and runs up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs. It features a 256-token canvas and self-correction capabilities.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open text generation model from Google that applies a diffusion-based approach rather than conventional autoregressive decoding. The reported gains include text generation up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs, a 256-token canvas, and self-correction capabilities. The shift matters because diffusion methods generate text differently from token-by-token models, and an open release lets the approach be tested directly.
